name: Company Info Agent Evaluation
description: Golden eval set for the agent improvement cycle demo. Starts with 3 cases that the V1 prompt handles correctly. Failed synthetic cases are extracted into this set each cycle, raising the regression bar.

eval_cases.question: How many PTO days do I get per year?
eval_cases.notes: V1 has this info in the prompt, should pass

eval_cases.question: How many sick days do I have?
eval_cases.notes: V1 has this info in the prompt, should pass

eval_cases.question: How many days can I work from home?
eval_cases.notes: V1 has this info in the prompt, should pass

eval_cases.question: What are the daily core hours that I am expected to be available when working remotely?
What is the maximum daily limit for meal expenses when traveling for business?
What is the company's matching contribution percentage for the 401k plan?
Is New Year's Eve observed as a paid holiday?
How many weeks of parental leave are provided for a secondary caregiver?
If I am out of office for four consecutive days due to illness, will I need to provide a doctor's note?
